description: Deterministic learning from rejected drafts: copies reviewer free-text feedback verbatim into prompt_rules (scope=avoid), deduped by feedback id, pruned to newest 15 per account. No LLM involved.
name: MailBOX-FeedbackDistill

parameters.query: INSERT INTO mailbox.prompt_rules (account_id, scope, rule, rationale, created_by) SELECT d.account_id, 'avoid', 'Operator rejected a ' || coalesce(d.classification_category, 'previous') || ' draft to ' || coalesce(d.from_addr, 'a sender') || ' (reason: ' || df.reason_code || '). Operator note: ' || trim(df.free_text), 'feedback#' || df.id, 'feedback-distiller' FROM mailbox.draft_feedback df JOIN mailbox.drafts d ON d.id = df.draft_id WHERE df.reason_code IN ('wrong_tone','factually_inaccurate','missing_context','other') AND coalesce(trim(df.free_text),'') <> '' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mailbox.prompt_rules pr WHERE pr.rationale = 'feedback#' || df.id)

DELETE FROM mailbox.prompt_rules pr WHERE pr.created_by = 'feedback-distiller' AND pr.id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM (SELECT id, row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY account_id ORDER BY id DESC) AS rn FROM mailbox.prompt_rules WHERE created_by = 'feedback-distiller') t WHERE t.rn <= 15)
